title: CombatManager
description: Enhance your server with a powerful Combat Manager system designed to control, customize, and optimize PvP.
body:
# CombatManager

**A Combat Manager plugin made by beanie to control PvP on your server. Lightweight, simple, and fully configurable to keep combat fair and balanced.**

[![Join our Discord](https://i.postimg.cc/jDrK27Vb/sfwefews.png)](https://discord.gg/hfXsEj58Bx)

## × Features:

### 〃Combat Timer Duration -

Players remain in combat for a configurable duration (default - 60 seconds).

### 〃Combat Timer Display Settings -
**Options:** 
> bossbar   - Shows the timer as a boss bar at the top of the screen
>
> chat      - Sends a single warning message in chat when combat starts
>
> actionbar - Shows timer as an action bar above hotbar

### 〃Combat Shutdown Settings -
**Controls what happens to players who are still in combat when the server stops**

### 〃Combat Logout Settings -
**Options:** 
> instant  - Player dies immediately when logging out in combat
>
> delayed  - Player has time to rejoin before dying [Timer is configurable]
>
> warning  - No death, just sends a warning

### 〃Items restrictions -
**Control certain items while players are in combat:**
>
>Elytra - Disable Elytra usage during combat.
>
>Riptide Tridents - Disable Riptide tridents while in combat.

### 〃Command Block Settings -
**Blocks certain commands while a player is in combat**

If you're enjoying the plugin, please consider giving it a like! <3
